title: Write table-driven invalid percentage tests
scenario: Invalid cases deserve precise tests too. Table-driven tests make it clear which inputs should fail.
instructions: Add a test that loops over invalid values and checks PercentageError::OutOfRange.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps percentage-invalid-table-tests explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
